items.summary: Front cover of Goethe-Zertifikat A1 Start Deutsch 1 practice set.

Title page with table of contents listing exam sections.
Blank page.
Foreword describing the A1 exam scope and structure.
Blank page.
Listening section intro and general instructions.
Listening Teil 1 instructions with worked example about room number.
Listening multiple-choice questions on clothing, food, museum hours.
Listening multiple-choice on sport, holiday, flight duration.
Listening Teil 2 true-false announcements at station and airport.
Listening Teil 3 multiple-choice on phone calls and plans.
Listening multiple-choice on meeting place and time.
Blank page with only footer and logos.
Reading and Writing section intro and instructions.
Reading Teil 1 true-false about email planning a Weimar meeting.
Reading true-false about a sports club summer excursion.
Reading Teil 2 matching websites for weather and housing.
Reading matching websites for airport transport and holiday trips.
Reading matching websites for holiday rentals and football.
Reading Teil 3 true-false on public notices, tickets.
Reading true-false about hotel door and restaurant hours.
Reading true-false about club film night and station counters.
Writing Teil 1 filling a language-school registration form.
Writing Teil 2 email inviting a friend to a birthday.
Blank page.
Speaking section intro and general instructions.
Speaking Teil 1 self-introduction prompt keywords.
Speaking Teil 2 word cards on weekend theme.
Speaking Teil 2 word cards on school theme.
Speaking Teil 3 picture cards for making requests.
Speaking Teil 3 further picture cards for requests.
Examiner pages table of contents.
Listening transcript Teil 1 example and items 1-3.
Listening transcript items 4-6.
Listening transcript Teil 2 announcements items 7-10.
Listening transcript Teil 3 messages items 11-15.
Answer key for Listening, Reading, Writing tasks.
Writing assessment criteria and scoring guide.
Sample writing responses with awarded points.
Oral exam guidance and Teil 1 introduction script.
Oral exam script for spelling and Teil 2 information exchange.
Oral exam Teil 3 request-formulation guidance and closing.
Speaking assessment criteria and scoring guide.
